title: QUANTITY SURVEYOR (QS)
description:
Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd is seeking an experienced Quantity Surveyor to join their team in the Yishun North Region. This is a full-time position that plays a crucial role in managing the financial aspects of construction projects, ensuring the efficient use of resources and delivering value for our clients.

What you'll be doing

  • Preparing detailed cost estimates, bills of quantities, and tender documents for construction projects
  • Negotiating and managing contracts with suppliers, subcontractors, and other stakeholders
  • Monitoring project costs and expenditures, and providing regular financial reports to project managers
  • Identifying and evaluating cost-saving opportunities throughout the construction process
  • Advising on contractual and commercial matters, and resolving any disputes that may arise
  • Collaborating with the project team to ensure the successful delivery of construction projects within budget and on time

What we're looking for

  • Degree or professional qualification in Quantity Surveying or a related field
  • Minimum 5 years of experience as a Quantity Surveyor in the construction industry
  • Strong understanding of construction contracts, cost management, and financial reporting
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret technical drawings and specifications
  • Proficient in the use of quantity surveying software and other relevant tools
  • Strong communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to work effectively with multi-disciplinary teams
  • Familiarity with local regulations and industry standards in the construction sector
  • Prefer Singaporeans or Permenent Residence
  • Immediate Hiring

What we offer

At Witflux Engineering, we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. Our benefits package includes a competitive salary, performance-based bonuses, and opportunities for career development and training. We also prioritise work-life balance, offering flexible working arrangements and a range of wellbeing initiatives to support our team.

About us

Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd is a leading construction and engineering firm with a strong track record of delivering high-quality projects across the Yishun North Region. Our mission is to provide innovative solutions that drive sustainable growth and create lasting value for our clients. We are proud of our talented and dedicated team, who are the driving force behind our success.

If you're ready to take the next step in your career as a Quantity Surveyor, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now to join our team at Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd.

postedCompany.description: Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd was set up in December 2011. From a humble start-up of 10 staff, the company has established itself as one of the market leaders through sheer hard work and perseverance. Today, the company has attained a credible grading for government & private contracts.
